narrative:
Green Creek C (precinct in Sandusky County) has 628 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.7 percentage points.
